programme.title: The Swamp Ghost
programme.desc: Swamp Ghost is an hour long documentary covering the attempt to recover the long lost aircraft. Fred Hagen, Aircraft Historian and Recovery Expert is on mission to recover the Swamp Ghost and return it home. Fred and his team trek through crocodile and deadly insect infested swamps to recover the long lost aircraft.

programme.title: Showdown of the Unbeatables
programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry's water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA's super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: After losing both her parents and battling an eating disorder, Paige turns to an adventure with Bear Grylls to regain her confidence in life. On this emotional journey, she reconnects with herself and the memories of her outdoor-loving dad.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes
programme.desc: Quail and their habitat are studied in Texas.

programme.title: Making Pandas
programme.desc: The iconic Giant Panda is on the brink. With only 1600 left in the wild, pressures on their natural habitat and a notoriously small window for reproduction are edging them towards extinction - fast.Over 1 year, we go behind-the-scenes and follow the incredible work of a dedicated group of zookeepers and vets as they race to get Singapore's famed couple… to fall in ‘love'. The team from the River S

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: The Force of Nature 2022
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it.The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters.The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet house hunter Bec and her son Quin who are looking for a multi million dollar property in Toorak, Melbourne.

programme.title: Million Dollar House Hunters
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet house hunters Axle and Maree who are looking for a multi million dollar property in Seddon, Melbourne.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Josh narrowly avoids disaster driving into the mine with a load of fuel and Claudia's devastated when a jade slab cracks in half while she's running the saw.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they're running out of time and options.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Claudia turns to her dad Steve for help when she fears the biggest sale of her mining career is slipping through her fingers.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Tension boils over between Claudia, Robin and Josh as they make a last-ditch attempt to close a deal with a buyer from Vietnam.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: Croc College
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.title: Heavy Load
programme.desc: Major transport in an open-cast mine. A huge steel frame has to be moved to another site. A job for heavy transport professional Randolf Peters. The route: an obstacle course. Tight bends, steep downhill sections and obstructing power lines have to be overcome. The heavy transport has to be kept in sight every second. This means running backwards for kilometres and precision work with heavy transp

programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls meets actor Ben Stiller (The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)) on the rugged mountains of the Isle of Skye in Northern Scotland, to go on a once in a lifetime adventure. As they explore their surroundings, Bear tests Ben's limits in an effort to see how he measures up to the unpredictable and unforgiving challenges of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack travels to Lucca, Italy, to share the British classic bangers and mash. A Michelin star chef proposes he radically changes the dish and transforms it into a masterpiece.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack travels to landlocked Zagreb in Croatia to cook fish and chips for hungry locals and a politician. Will they like his version of the internationally renowned meal?

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine's old equipment and Josh's patience.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: Jade Fever - Season 6
programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Mission Survive
programme.desc: The final three contestants Kelly Holmes, Mike Tindall and Vogue Williams fight it out to be crowned Bear's Mission Survivor. The first task sees the group split for the first time, as the contenders abseil down a 300ft waterfall one by one. They then have to build a camp without their usual supplies, before tucking into the evening's dinner - rats, which must be gutted and cooked. The next mornin

THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: GASPOL
programme.desc: Gaspol, an SCTV game show hosted by Raffi Ahmad, is filled with prizes and tens of millions of rupiah in cash.

programme.title: Ketika Level Tertinggi Cinta Adalah Soto Ayam
programme.desc: Raga is a reckless 'eternal student' struggling to finally graduate after years of slacking off. His life takes a turn when he clashes with Alin, a hardworking girl who sells soto to pay for her tuition at the same campus. Their constant bickering draws everyone's attention, but beneath the friction, a deep romance begins to brew.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Ora Ngapak Ora Kepenak
programme.desc: Ayu (Ika Diharjo) always speaks with a thick accent. While searching for her biological father, Ayu meets Beni (Masaji Wijayanto), who constantly criticizes her way of speaking.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Mantanan Sama Gue Mantenan Sama Dia, Chuaks
programme.desc: Tasya and Suji met in the park when they were both dumped by their boyfriends at the same time. The two became closer when Tasya asked Suji to pretend to be her boyfriend so that her ex would be jealous of her. Because they spent so much time together, their relationship became serious.

programme.title: Salfok Sama Neng Domba Satu Ini
programme.desc: Virza's restaurant went bankrupt because his regular sheep supplier was late in delivering meat for his restaurant. Sifa, the owner of the sheep farm, had to accept compensation by selling Virza's small shop. The two became closer, and Virza secretly developed feelings for Sifa.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Ganteng Ganteng Bau Domba, Tapi Aku Suka
programme.desc: Yosi is devastated to discover that her high school crush is now her brother-in-law. Just as she feels her heart is permanently broken, she meets Ryan, a local sheep farmer. Ryan’s genuine love and simple life become the cure for Yosi's heartache, and she soon finds herself falling for the man who saved her spirit.

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby (Shanice Margaretha) has to replace her mother, who sells cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa (Fero Walandouw) of being part of a child abduction syndicate. Ruby refuses to accept such accusations and defends herself.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Feeling abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel) after seeing him post videos with a beautiful girl, Maya (Shanice Margaretha) decides enough is enough. She embarks on a mission to completely transform her appearance and behavior, determined to become the kind of woman who can capture the heart of any handsome man.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 17
programme.desc: Oh no! Dr Slime's pet fish has died! Probably because the tank was filthy and badly decorated with strange things! What can he do to clean out the tank thoroughly, and what should he use to decorate his fish tank?

programme.title: Slimed Science - EP 18
programme.desc: Dr Slime has a new friend - EGGWARD. Yes, it's an egg! And he's going on an adventure with Eggward! What can he do to help Eggward float across the waters for his adventures?

programme.title: Wild Kratts S7 - EP 18
programme.desc: In each episode, Chris and Martin Kratt travel to a different corner of the world to meet amazing new animals. Join the Wild Kratts for a laugh-out-loud comedy adventure, as Martin and Chris activate their Creature Power Suits to rescue their animal friends!

programme.title: Pfffirates - EP 11
programme.desc: On Calypso Island, three crews are taught Pfffiracy by the legendary Captain Lamar. programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Kuwakuwi Aku Gwenchana Tanpamu
programme.desc: Raja, a mischievous young man, got himself into trouble, prompting his grandmother, Omah Lisa, to seize all his assets. In this difficult situation, Raja tried to ask his brother, Farel, for help, but ended up in conflict with him. Amidst the chaos, Putri, a rolled egg seller, accidentally got involved and considered a marriage proposal to help her grandfather.
